race.comment: SILVER PLEDGE (1) presents third up having improved nicely second up at Wangaratta on heavy ground when battling on gamely to the line and only going down by the barest of margins. Ready to peak now up to a staying trip and should be very hard to hold out. THREE REEL ROSES (9) ran a better race last start, finishing 5 lengths away in fourth over 2400m at Bendigo behind a subsequent Flemington winner. Needs another win but is well placed to do so. AMAWASHA (3) made nice improvement second up at Bairnsdale in a BM56 when drawn very wide and covering ground but coming again to grab fourth. He should be at peak fitness now and draws for a much kinder run. MAWHERA (6) is racing fairly okay and should be thereabouts in a thin race.
